name: Feature request

## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the proposed feature.

## Roadmap Fit

Which roadmap phase does this belong to?

## Open Core or Enterprise Extension

Explain whether this belongs in the open core or should remain an extension.

## Security and Governance Considerations

Describe scope, visibility, retention, or audit implications.
